summary: iter107 Phase 2 — Admin config Quiz/Tap + leaderboard country segmentation verified end-to-end. 27 passed / 1 skipped / 0 failed across admin config, quiz/tap integration, and leaderboard endpoints.

minor.issue: Pydantic list type is permissive (accepts dict as list coercion → 422 only on strict cases). Handler relies on ValueError branch. Low impact — still returns 400/422, never 500.

Skipped because Alice had already played today's tap session. No admin reset was issued to avoid leaving state; duration=15 admin override NOT validated against a fresh tap/start, but tap_max_taps_per_second + tap_reward_thresholds path was validated via Bob (test_submit_caps_and_flags_cheated passes).

critical_code_review_comments: games_settings.update_quiz_config silently drops partial payloads that pass only unknown keys (because Pydantic QuizUpdate strips them) — the 'Clé inconnue' check in update_quiz_config is dead code when going through the route layer (Pydantic already filters). The admin-games router then raises 400 'Aucun champ à mettre à jour' on empty payload which is acceptable UX, but the explicit 'unknown key' error message from games_settings is unreachable via HTTP. Consider using model_config = ConfigDict(extra='forbid') on QuizUpdate/TapUpdate to surface the original French error message.
routes/quiz.py and routes/tap.py import from services.games_settings inside the async helpers (hot path) — minor perf cost. Consider moving the import to module top-level.

services.points_service.ensure_game_enabled('quiz') appears to also gate on a separate key; when quiz_enabled is True in admin_settings but its legacy counterpart is False (or vice-versa) the two gates could disagree. Tests passed since ensure_game_enabled reads same source, but worth a code audit.
test_credentials: admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024!, bob@japap.com / Test1234!, alice@japap.com / Alice2026!. Turnstile is ACTIVE in this env — direct /api/auth/login with password returns 400 'Turnstile verification required'. Tests bypass this by minting a JWT directly from JWT_SECRET + DATABASE_URL (same pattern as iter106).
seed_data_creation: None — all tests flush Bob's quiz/tap runs via /api/quiz/admin/reset-user + /api/tap/admin/reset-user and revert any admin_settings they touch in finally blocks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This environment requires JWT minting to authenticate (Turnstile enabled on /api/auth/login). Reuse helper from test_iter106 or test_iter107: env vars REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, JWT_SECRET, DATABASE_URL must be loaded (dotenv from /app/frontend/.env + /app/backend/.env). Bob had country_code set — country leaderboard returns populated 'country_code' in me. Admin config endpoints work for both 'admin' and 'superadmin' roles (403 for everyone else).
verified_behaviors: GET/PUT /api/admin/games/quiz — 403 for non-admin, 200 for admin, bounds enforced (1-50 sessions/day with French error 'doit être entre 1 et 50'), partial updates persist, bool round-trip (True→False→True) works

GET/PUT /api/admin/games/tap — 403 for non-admin, malformed thresholds return 400 'Chaque palier doit avoir {taps, reward}', non-list thresholds rejected, out-of-bounds sessions_per_day returns 400, thresholds persisted sorted ascending
POST /api/quiz/start honours admin's quiz_enabled (503 when False), quiz_timer_seconds (15s returned in /start payload), quiz_sessions_per_day (429 after limit)
POST /api/tap/submit caps taps at tap_max_taps_per_second × tap_duration_seconds (120), sets cheated=true, awards correct bonus from tap_reward_thresholds (tier=100 → +10)

GET /api/games/leaderboard: requires auth, defaults to scope=global, scope=country defaults to user's country_code, returns items with {rank,user_id,name,total,plays,country_code}, me has rank_global/rank_country/country_code, game and period filters accepted
GET /api/referrals/leaderboard: same segmentation — scope=global default, scope=country auto-fills country_code, me exposes both rank_global and rank_country
